title: Barosma betulina (Buchu)
intro: The medicinal aspects of Barosma betulina (Buchu) have been well known in traditional African medicine for centuries. The plant contains several constituents including tannins, flavonoids, and alkaloids that have been shown to have therapeutic properties. These include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. Buchu is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract for medicinal purposes. However, it is important to note that Buchu may cause side effects such as headache, nausea, and diarrhea in some individuals. Therefore, it is recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before consuming Buchu, especially if you have any pre-existing medical conditions or are taking medication.
